presentation.title: Program Coach Deck 01 — The Financial Services Landscape

slides.title: Day 2 Opening — From Identity to Industry
slides.body:
Yesterday you defined who you are becoming.
Today we ask: what industry will you build in?

Financial services is one of the largest, most stable, and most impact-driven sectors in the Philippines.
slides.speakerNotes: Bridge from Day 1 identity. Reference participant ambition statements. 3 min.
discussionQuestions: How does your ambition connect to an industry — not just a job?

slides.title: Financial Services Ecosystem
slides.body:
Banks · Insurance · Investments · Financial Planning · Fintech

Protection products (life, health, VUL) fund education, retirement, and legacy.
Advisors and agency builders are entrepreneurs within this ecosystem.
slides.speakerNotes: Use local examples. Avoid product pitch — this is landscape. 6 min.
discussionQuestions: Which part of the ecosystem interests you most?

slides.title: Insurance & Protection Story
slides.body:
Insurance is not a transaction — it is a promise.

AIA's protection mission: help people live Healthier, Longer, Better Lives.

The opportunity: millions of Filipinos are underinsured. Financial entrepreneurs close the protection gap.
slides.speakerNotes: Connect to AIA Day 1 story. 5 min.
discussionQuestions: Would you personally buy protection today? Why or why not?

slides.title: Career Opportunities in Financial Entrepreneurship
slides.body:
Advisor → Unit Manager → Agency Director
Specialist Consultant → Practice Owner

SPIKE prepares you for both agency building and specialist consulting paths.
slides.speakerNotes: Link to Day 1 career direction exploration. 4 min.
discussionQuestions: Where do you see yourself adding value in this industry?

slides.title: Deck 01 Close — Industry Immersion Begins
slides.body:
Next: Deck 02 — Connecting Industry to Your Ambition.
Then: practitioner interviews, squad debrief, and research plan.
discussionQuestions: What do you want to learn from a practitioner today?
